direction: reuse cached QL normal velocity in KLAS3 boundary inflow calculation
rationale: CalculateFluxKernel already computes QL[1] as the owner-cell normal velocity before boundary dispatch, but CalculateKlas3 recomputes the same projection to form QZH3. Reusing QL[1] removes redundant geometry loads and multiply-add work on KLAS3 boundary sides while preserving branch order and flux arithmetic.
